theme_strategy: Dark mode by default, high-contrast, 'Terminal/Electric' archetype.

headings.usage: Massive sizes (text-5xl to 8xl) for landing, tracking-tighter.

body.usage: Clean, technical readability for chat and descriptions.

mono.usage: Code generation previews, system logs, overlines.

surfaces: Grid Borders: Use border-collapse style with 1px solid border-white/10 for the dashboard skeleton.
The Tracing Beam: For active code generation blocks and premium feature cards.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on dark backgrounds to remove digital flatness.

landing_page.description: Asymmetrical bento boxes, massive typography, floating elements with wide gaps (gap-8).

dashboard.description: Strict 3-column technical layout. Left: Projects (col-span-1). Center: Chat (col-span-2). Right: Code Preview (col-span-2). Tight gaps (gap-0 to gap-4), explicit borders.

motion.interactions: Crisp, fast. Hover states elevate -translate-y-1 with neon shadow.
motion.chat_generation: Typewriter effect for AI responses, smooth height expansion for code blocks.

components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Primary CTA uses Cyber Yellow (#E4FF00) with Black text.
components.chat_bubbles: Flat, user messages are right-aligned with subtle surface background. AI messages are left-aligned, border-l-2 border-primary_accent.
components.status_indicator: Pulsing dot (Green for Online/Google, Cyan for Offline/Local/SMS).

3d_libraries.usage: For a lightweight, performant mesh network background on the landing page. Avoid heavy 3D to keep performance critical for real-time generation.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for text. Focus rings must be high-contrast Cyber Yellow.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='generate-app-btn').

media.strategy: High-contrast, dark atmospheric photography paired with abstract tech visuals.

image_urls.description: Abstract neon lines forming a digital landscape
A woman working late on a laptop with code displayed on the screen in a dark room.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for Landing Page to achieve asymmetrical bento layouts. Avoid rigid components here.
Use customized Shadcn UI for Dashboard (Select, Dialog, Tabs, ScrollArea) heavily styled to match the dark 'Terminal' theme.
Language must be in French as requested.
Create a toggle for Dark/Light mode, but default strictly to Dark mode.
The UI must look like a high-end developer tool (Cursor/Emergent AI) but accessible to non-devs. Use clear French labels.
Do NOT use pure #000000 or #808080. Use #050505 or #0F0F13 for backgrounds.
NEVER center-align everything. Use explicit left alignment for dense content.
DO NOT use transparent backgrounds for dropdowns or sticky headers without backdrop-blur.
Ensure the Chat UI uses `overflow-auto` correctly so the whole page doesn't scroll awkwardly.
Use framer-motion for smooth transitions, but keep it performant.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts, located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
